setup.title: Initial Setup
setup.description: Welcome! No users exist yet. Create the first administrator account to start using SnowShare.
setup.info: This account will be the first administrator of SnowShare.
setup.success_message: First account created successfully! You can now sign in.
setup.admin_notice: This account will have all administrator privileges.

admin.title: Administration Dashboard
admin.subtitle: Manage your SnowShare instance

oauth.title: OAuth Providers
oauth.description: Configure external authentication providers. You will need to create an OAuth app on the provider's developer console.
oauth.callback_help: Copy this URL to your OAuth provider settings.
oauth.secret_help: The secret is encrypted before being stored.
oauth.issuer_help: The base URL of your OpenID Connect provider (e.g. https://auth.example.com/realms/myrealm)
oauth.tenant_id_help: The identifier of your Azure AD tenant

links.confirm_delete: Are you sure you want to delete this link?
links.no_links: No custom links added. GitHub and License links will be displayed.
links.info: Custom links will appear in the footer. When custom links are present, GitHub and License links are hidden.

settings.title: Settings
settings.allow_signup_desc: Allow new users to create accounts
settings.disable_credentials_login_desc: Only allow login via SSO (Single Sign-On). Valid only if at least one SSO provider is active.
settings.no_sso_active: Cannot enable: No active SSO provider found.
settings.warning_disable_credentials_message:
⚠️ Before enabling this option, please verify that:

1. Your SSO authentication method is working correctly
2. At least one administrator account is linked with an SSO provider in /profile

If you proceed without meeting these requirements, you may lose access to the admin panel.

Are you sure you want to continue?
settings.allow_anon_fileshare_desc: Allow unauthenticated users to share files
settings.allow_anon_linkshare_desc: Allow unauthenticated users to share links
settings.allow_anon_pasteshare_desc: Allow unauthenticated users to share code/text

branding.app_name_hint: The name displayed in the navigation bar and page title
branding.app_description_hint: The description displayed on the home page

branding.favicon_url_hint: URL of an image for the favicon (ICO, PNG)
branding.primary_color_hint: Used for buttons, links and main accents
branding.accent_color_hint: Used for gradients and secondary elements

branding.info_2: Use absolute URLs for logo and favicon (https://...)
branding.info_3: Colors must be in hexadecimal format (#RRGGBB)
branding.background_image_url_hint: URL of a custom background image (optional)
branding.font_family_hint: The font used globally across the entire application

errors.password_length: Password must be between {{min}} and {{max}} characters
errors.user_already_exists: A user with this email already exists
errors.slug_already_taken: This custom URL is already taken. Please choose another one.

errors.url_protocol_not_allowed: Only HTTP and HTTPS protocols are allowed
errors.password_invalid_length: Password must be between {{min}} and {{max}} characters.
errors.expiration_in_past: Expiration date must be in the future.

errors.expiration_required: Unauthenticated users must provide an expiration date.

errors.anon_file_share_disabled: Anonymous users are not allowed to share files. Please log in.
errors.anon_paste_share_disabled: Anonymous users are not allowed to share code. Please log in.
errors.file_too_large: File size exceeds the limit of {{maxSizeMB}}MB
errors.display_name_too_long: Display name must be at most {{max}} characters
